rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description and accurate amount extraction. 'Pauperiana' is a good interpretation of the script. The 'V' mark in the pence column is correctly interpreted as 0 for a total carried over. Row type confirmed as 'total' due to its function. Claude-haiku's description and missing amounts were incorrect.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amounts (27/5/10) are accurate. Claude-haiku misread pounds and description details.

rows.description: By Falconer 12½ Int. on £247.14.2, 3½ Cents to July 1850
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms the detailed description and the amounts (8/11/0) are accurate. Claude-haiku's 'Ditto' and missing pounds are incorrect.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Subscriptions &c. Infirmary' and amounts 1/1/0. Claude-haiku entirely missed this row and inserted an invented row ('Mr Kilsomer...') instead, which has been dropped.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Grey Coat School'. Amounts 20/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Green Good School'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'St. Giles Do'. Amounts 5/5/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Maddoxston Do.'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'South Newington Do'. Amounts 5/5/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Southmoon Do.'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Little Tew Do'. Amounts 6/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku completely misread the description as 'Shill S[?] go'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Garston Do' and correct amounts 3/3/0. Claude-haiku misread both description ('Gavelton Do.') and pounds amount (5).
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Merton Do' and correct amounts 5/5/0. Claude-haiku misread both description ('Merdoen Do.') and shillings amount (3).
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Garsington Do'. Amounts 3/3/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Gorngleton Do.'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'L. Wittenham Do'. Amounts 5/5/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the spelling of the place name as 'L Wittlehams Do.'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Bensington Do'. Amounts 2/2/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Berryngton Do.'.
Selected gemini-flash for description 'Gwinicar Do', which visually matches better than Claude-haiku's 'Emmekar Do.'. Amounts 5/0/0 are visually confirmed.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Poor of Gwinicar', consistent with previous entries and visually confirmed. Claude-haiku's note on 'Poor of...' was nearly there, but its final read was incorrect ('Door of Guenear').

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Diocesan Board of Education'. Amounts 10/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the description significantly ('Overseers Board of Oversatin').

rows.description: Small Livings in Diocese of Oxon
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Small Livings in Diocese of Oxon'. Amounts 5/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku completely misread the description ('Small Simmps in Streets of Bian'), which its own notes indicate was highly uncertain.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Widows & Orphans of Clergy Do'. Amounts 5/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku completely misread the description ('Prisoner & Ordinary of Clowpy Ds').
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'University. Marshalls' and amounts 2/0/0. Claude-haiku misidentified the row as a header and misread 'Marshalls' as 'Market Hall'.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Bele Ringer & Chapel Clerk'. Its note regarding 'Bele' rather than 'Bell' is insightful and confirmed by visual inspection. Amounts 10/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread as 'Bale Bringer'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Corn Rents' and amounts of 19 shillings, 6 pence, with no pounds value. Claude-haiku misread 'Rents' as 'Prices' and incorrectly added a pounds value of 1.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Easter Offering'. Amounts 1/1/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread 'Offering' as 'Returns'.

Selected gemini-flash for its accurate and complete description, including embedded values in brackets, which are correctly transcribed. The main amounts 21/13/4 are visually confirmed and are the sum of the embedded values. Claude-haiku misinterpreted the bracketed text as struck-through corrections.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Synodals and Procurations'. Amounts 2/16/8 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku severely misread the description ('Haywoods and Overseers [or Wardenings]').

Interpreted 'College Gardener' as a header based on visual indentation and subsequent quarterly entries. Selected gemini-flash's row type and description for this part. Claude-haiku incorrectly combined this into a single entry with an amount for the first quarter.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description '1st Quarter' and amounts 7/12/0. Claude-haiku incorrectly combined this with the 'College Gardener' header and then misread the amount.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description '2nd Do' and amounts 7/13/9. Claude-haiku misread pounds (as 1) and pence (as 0).
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description '3rd Do' and amounts 12/15/11. Claude-haiku misread pounds (as 1), shillings (as 13), and pence (as 0).
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description '4th Do' and amounts 7/12/0. Claude-haiku misread pounds (as 1) and shillings (as 13).

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Interest on Stubbs Deposit'. The initial 'S' of 'Stubbs' is confirmed by the specific note from gemini-flash about possible ambiguity (S vs G). Amounts 6/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread 'Stubbs' as 'Trustee's'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Open Scholarships. Viz. Mr. Kempe.'. Amounts 40/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread parts of the description ('Ezgl. Mr Semke').

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Mr. Hilgrefs'. Its note about the faded 's' is confirmed. Amounts 40/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the name significantly ('Mr Silvowels').
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Mr. Coase'. Amounts 40/0/0 are visually confirmed. Claude-haiku misread the name ('Mr Roades').

Both extractors agreed on the total amount and row type. Selected gemini-flash's empty description as the most accurate representation for the 'description' field of a total line, with the full sum being represented in the amount fields. Visual verification confirms 619/3/7.
